revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1}}} {{doc|content= {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Bo-textonly/fonts.css}} ==Usage== This template allows the correct display of Tibetan script (with the proper fonts and suitable text size), and shows the text only. This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers [[Category:Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Sino-Tibetan multilingual support templates
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1}}} {{doc|content= {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Bo-textonly/fonts.css}} ==Usage== This template allows the correct display of Tibetan script (with the proper fonts and suitable text size), and shows the text only. This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }}

This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1}}} {{doc|content= {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Bo-textonly/fonts.css}} ==Usage== This template allows the correct display of Tibetan script (with the proper fonts and suitable text size), and shows the text only. This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1}}} {{doc|content= {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Bo-textonly/fonts.css}} ==Usage== This template allows the correct display of Tibetan script (with the proper fonts and suitable text size), and shows the text only. This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1}}} {{doc|content= {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Bo-textonly/fonts.css}} ==Usage== This template allows the correct display of Tibetan script (with the proper fonts and suitable text size), and shows the text only. This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bo-textonly here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{{{{|safesubst:}}}ifsubst|1=|2=}}{{{1}}} {{doc|content= {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Bo-textonly/fonts.css}} ==Usage== This template allows the correct display of Tibetan script (with the proper fonts and suitable text size), and shows the text only. This template can be used when Tibetan script is displayed mid-paragraph, and there is no need to have links to script names and romanizations. ;Example usage: *{{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}} produces {{Bo-textonly|དྲི་མེད་བཤེས་གཉེན་|lang=bo}}. ==See also== *[[:Template:Bo]] - template with language markers }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
